2606.27922.title: Reflect-R1: Evidence-Driven Reflection for Self-Correction in Long Video Understanding
2606.27922.paper_summary: Current multimodal reflection mechanisms for long video understanding predominantly rely on closed-loop self-reflection within internal parameters. Lacking objective external evidence, models are frequently trapped in blind confidence and often fail to correct errors. Furthermore, applying reinforcement learning to multi-stage reflection pipelines introduces severe policy coupling, which is exacerbated by a critical scarcity of dedicated training data. To address these limitations, this work proposes Reflect-R1, the first Evidence-Driven self-correction framework for long video understanding. The framework constructs a three-stage pipeline consisting of intuition, verification, and arbitration. By dynamically retrieving objective visual evidence to verify initial intuitions and autonomously executing multiple temporal searches to resolve conflicts, it completely breaks the hallucination loop. To overcome policy coupling, we design a stage-decoupled reinforcement learning algorithm named SD-GRPO that independently computes advantage functions across different reasoning stages. Concurrently, we construct a dataset of 120K samples to bridge the training data gap. Extensive experiments on benchmarks such as VideoMME and LongVideoBench demonstrate that Reflect-R1 achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our method significantly improves the genuine rectification rate and enables authentic self-correction strictly grounded in objective evidence.
2606.27922.paper_summary_zh: 目前的多模態反思機制在長視頻理解中主要依賴於內部參數的閉環自我反思。缺乏客觀的外部證據，模型經常陷入盲目的自信，並且常常無法糾正錯誤。此外，將強化學習應用於多階段反思管道會引入嚴重的政策耦合，這一問題因專用訓練數據的嚴重短缺而加劇。為了解決這些限制，本研究提出了Reflect-R1，首個基於證據驅動的自我糾正框架，用於長視頻理解。該框架構建了一個由直覺、驗證和仲裁組成的三階段管道。通過動態檢索客觀的視覺證據來驗證初步直覺，並自主執行多次時間搜索以解決衝突，它徹底打破了幻覺循環。為了克服政策耦合，我們設計了一種名為SD-GRPO的階段解耦強化學習算法，該算法獨立計算不同推理階段的優勢函數。同時，我們構建了一個包含12萬個樣本的數據集，以填補訓練數據的缺口。在VideoMME和LongVideoBench等基準上的廣泛實驗表明，Reflect-R1達到了最先進的性能。我們的方法顯著提高了真實糾正率，並使真正的自我糾正嚴格基於客觀證據。
2606.27922.author: Shuimu Chen et.al.
2606.27922.authors: Shuimu Chen, Yuteng Chen, Yuanshen Guan, Zebang Cheng, Zeyu Zhang, Shengqian Qin, Bin Xia, Jiaran Li, Wenming Yang, Fei Ma
